name: RMW - M16
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - M16. The first assault rifle adopted by the US army and since then became synonimus with the American infantry. The A2 variant features a 3 round burst instead of the usual Automatic fire mode… worst idea ever. But still, its iconic. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
